title: These Ancient Rituals ELIMINATED Your Fear Of Death
summary: This interview discusses ancient rituals at Eleusis and their use of psychedelic substances to eliminate fear of death. The conversation also touches on evidence suggesting early Christianity may have incorporated psychedelic practices, including speculation about the Last Supper.

key_claims.claim: Eleusis was a setting for deep psychedelic journeys
Every initiate in the Eleusinian Mysteries was given a drink called the kykeon
Initiates had life-changing experiences and many philosophers reported losing their fear of death after the ritual
Early Christianity was a psychedelic religion
The Last Supper may have involved psychedelic substances
